description: Close-pair junction recovery recipe (docs/v2-close-pair-junction-recovery.md): sigma 1.5 heatmap, penalty-reduced focal loss, CenterNet-style radius-3 nearest-vertex offsets. Warm-started from runpod-v2-replay-correction-full-4000ada with the offset head re-initialized. Best checkpoint of the close-pair round: beats the V2 baseline on every strict-topology metric (edge F1 0.942 -> 0.953 on clean-1024-s15, extras 130 -> 95, junction recall 0.959 -> 0.973) but close-pair resolution plateaus at ~26% (gate was 80%); a from-scratch 5000-step ablation (R3) landed identically, so the ceiling is the recipe/input resolution, not the init.

inference.notes: junction_offset is radius-normalized (multiply by 3.0px). Decode with offset-vote clustering (eval_close_pairs.py decode_offset_clusters / tree-maker-rust evidence_extract offset_cluster_primitives). Requires batch-stats BatchNorm: model.eval() running stats collapse junction recall to ~0.35.
inference.supportedEnvelope: Readable rectified 1024px square CP inputs, same envelope as the V2 baseline.
